K. Knowles Excursions in Security

About

Katie Knowles (sigil) is an Information Security professional with a love of exploration.

By day, she is an Information Security Specialist within the enterprise security sphere. By night, she pursues a relentless quest for knowledge and community. Katie is a speaker and active participant in DC562, an alumni of RIT’s SPARSA, and a frequent volunteer with DEF CON’s Wall of Sheep. She firmly believes in growing alongside her peers, building strong teams, and good time spent on good projects.

  • Twitter
  • LinkedIn
  • Github

If you have a passion or curiosity for technology and would like to reach out, feel free to do so!

Email: katie(at)kknowl.es

NOTE: Thoughts and opinions expressed on this blog are purely mine, and do not reflect those of my employer.
